title: Virtuoso RDFZZ Error DB.DBA.SPARQL_REXEC
description:
I get the following response whenever I try to run a federated query from my sparql endpoint.

Virtuoso RDFZZ Error DB.DBA.SPARQL_REXEC('http://data.15926.org/rdl', ...) returned Content-Type 'text/html' status 'HTTP/1.1 200 OK'

the response and the value I am querying is returned but in a format I am not expecting. I am running VOS version 07.20.3217
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE materials (id INT PRIMARY KEY, label VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO materials (id, label, description) VALUES (1, 'Material A', 'Description of Material A');
INSERT INTO materials (id, label, description) VALUES (2, 'Material B', NULL);
SELECT label, IFNULL(description, 'No description available') AS description FROM materials WHERE id = 2;
SELECT * FROM materials WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM materials WHERE label LIKE 'Material%');
key_bug_features: Federated query returns unexpected Content-Type format
